entity: Tim Duncan career regular-season total rebounds = 15,091 (BBR). Warehouse SUM(avg_reb*gp) undercounts at 14,648 (delta 443)

query_target.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(avg_reb * gp)) AS career_reb FROM agg_player_season WHERE player_id = 1495 AND season_type = 'Regular'

notes: REGRESSION: warehouse sums to 14,648 REB but BBR's official Tim Duncan career regular-season rebounding total is 15,091. The 443-rebound gap over 19 seasons is consistent with the same agg_player_season gap pattern. Flip to stable when the warehouse value equals 15,091.
